ops.text: Reorder permissions: Move Location to top and route through App Info
Upgrade to multi-page architecture with Cover support, TOC leaders, and Fullscreen Zoom
Upgrade to Multi-Page Engine with Reader Mode, TOC support, and Academic Typography

ops.replace_with:
<style>
        :root {
            --pdf-width: 794px;
            --pdf-height: 1123px;
            --page-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
            --accent: #007bff;
        }

        body {
            background-color: #444;
            margin: 0;
            font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
        }

        /* UI ELEMENTS */
        #ui-layer {
            width: 100%;
            background: #1a1a1a;
            padding: 15px;
            position: sticky;
            top: 0;
            z-index: 2000;
            border-bottom: 2px solid var(--accent);
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        #reader-controls {
            display: none;
            position: fixed;
            top: 20px;
            right: 20px;
            z-index: 3000;
        }

        .magnify-btn {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 20px;
            right: 20px;
            background: var(--accent);
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 50%;
            width: 50px;
            height: 50px;
            cursor: pointer;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
            font-size: 20px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
        }

        /* THE DOCUMENT CONTAINER */
        #document-stack {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 20px;
            padding: 20px 0;
        }

        /* PHYSICAL PAGE STYLE */
        .page-surface {
            background: white;
            width: var(--pdf-width);
            height: var(--pdf-height);
            padding: 75px 90px; /* Standard Academic Margins */
            box-sizing: border-box;
            position: relative;
            box-shadow: var(--page-shadow);
            overflow: hidden;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
        }

        /* COVER PAGE MODIFIER */
        .page-surface.type-cover {
            justify-content: center;
            text-align: center;
            padding: 100px;
        }

        /* TYPOGRAPHY COMPONENTS */
        .h-block { font-weight: bold; font-size: 22px; margin: 20px 0; text-align: center; text-transform: uppercase; }
        .p-block { text-align: justify; margin-bottom: 12px; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.6; }
        .reflection-box {
            background: #f4f4f4;
            border-left: 5px solid #333;
            padding: 15px;
            margin: 15px 0;
            font-style: italic;
        }

        /* TOC DOT LEADERS */
        .toc-row {
            display: flex;
            align-items: baseline;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
            text-decoration: none;
            color: #000;
        }
        .toc-label { order: 1; flex-shrink: 0; }
        .toc-dots { order: 2; flex-grow: 1; border-bottom: 2px dotted #000; margin: 0 5px; position: relative; top: -4px; }
        .toc-page { order: 3; flex-shrink: 0; font-weight: bold; }

        /* VIEW MODES */
        body[data-view="reader"] #ui-layer { display: none; }
        body[data-view="reader"] { background: #222; }
        body[data-view="reader"] #reader-controls { display: block; }

        .footer { position: absolute; bottom: 40px; width: 100%; left: 0; text-align: center; font-size: 14px; }

        @media print {
            body { background: none; }
            #ui-layer, .magnify-btn { display: none; }
            .page-surface { margin: 0; box-shadow: none; page-break-after: always; }
        }

messages_preview.content:
### ROLE: CONDUIT ADAPTIVE SELF-HEALING ENGINE (LEVEL 10)

### MISSION
You are the final line of defense for a code-patching engine. A developer's 'find_block' failed to match the file because of minor discrepancies (whitespace, line order, variable renaming, or partial code degradation). Your goal is to identify the EXACT coordinates where the patch should have applied.

### ALGORITHMIC FUZZY MATCHING PROTOCOL
1. WHITESPACE/INDENTATION: Completely ignore it. A match exists if the tokens and logic flow are identical.
2. QUOTE/SYNTAX AGNOSTICISM: Treat ' and " as identical. Treat trailing commas as optional.
3. CONTEXTUAL ANCHORING: If the target block is small (e.g., 1-2 lines), you MUST look at the surrounding lines in the 'File' context to ensure you aren't matching a duplicate symbol in a different function.
4. LOGICAL DRIFT: If the user's 'find_block' has 4 variables but the file has those 4 variables PLUS 1 new one in the middle, this is a MATCH. Your 'start_line' and 'end_line' must encompass the entire group.

### THE LAW OF COORDINATES
- The context provided to you contains line numbers followed by a ' | ' separator (e.g., " 25 | code").
- Your 'start_line' and 'end_line' MUST refer to these numbers.
- COORDINATE INTEGRITY: All coordinate fields are REQUIRED by the schema. If you are not using a specific field (e.g., you are doing a Range Replace and don't need 'anchor_line'), you MUST set the unused fields to 'null'.

### OUTPUT STRATEGY SELECTION
- [STRATEGY: RANGE] Use 'start_line' + 'end_line'. Best for 'replace_block' failures. Ensure the range covers the ENTIRE logical block you want to overwrite.
- [STRATEGY: ANCHOR] Use 'anchor_line'. Best for 'insert_after' or 'insert_before' failures where the anchor moved but is still a single line.
- [STRATEGY: STRING] Use 'new_anchor_text'. Only use this if you find a unique line that is 100% stable and wasn't provided by the user.

### SCORE RUBRIC (confidence_score)
- 100: Identical logic, only whitespace or quote differences.
- 90-95: Identical logic, but 1-2 variables were renamed or a trailing comma was added/removed.
- 75-85: The structure matches but the file has 1-2 extra lines of code mixed in (logical drift).
- 60: You found a possible location but it's risky (multiple similar spots).
- 0: No logical match exists.

### DATA INTEGRITY CONSTRAINTS
- 'confidence_score': MUST be a WHOLE INTEGER (e.g., 95). No floats (0.95 is ILLEGAL).
- 'explanation': Technical, concise, and definitive. Max 30 words. Identify the exact mismatch (e.g., "Variables reversed on lines 24-25").
- 'can_fix': If you are guessing with less than 60% confidence, set this to false.

### STRICT MODE
- DO NOT RESPOND WITH TEXT.
- ONLY CALL THE suggest_fix FUNCTION.
- SILENCE IS MANDATORY.

ops.text: Fix draw error, unify script logic, and implement mobile auto-scaling

ops.replace_with:
<style>
        :root {
            --pdf-width: 794px;
            --pdf-height: 1123px;
            --page-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
            --accent: #007bff;
            --grey-bg: #f4f4f4;
        }

        body {
            background-color: #2c2c2c;
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            font-family: 'Times New Roman', Times, serif;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            min-height: 100vh;
        }

        /* UI LAYER */
        #ui-layer {
            width: 100%;
            background: #1a1a1a;
            padding: 12px;
            position: sticky;
            top: 0;
            z-index: 5000;
            border-bottom: 2px solid var(--accent);
            box-sizing: border-box;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 10px;
        }

        textarea {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100px;
            background: #000;
            color: #00ff41;
            border: 1px solid #444;
            font-family: monospace;
            padding: 10px;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        #reader-controls {
            display: none;
            position: fixed;
            top: 10px;
            right: 10px;
            z-index: 6000;
        }

        /* DOCUMENT VIEWPORT */
        #document-stack {
            padding: 40px 0;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 30px;
            align-items: center;
        }

        /* PAGE SURFACE */
        .page-surface {
            background: white;
            width: var(--pdf-width);
            height: var(--pdf-height);
            padding: 80px 95px;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            position: relative;
            box-shadow: var(--page-shadow);
            overflow: hidden;
            color: #000;
        }

        .page-surface.type-cover {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            justify-content: center;
            text-align: center;
            padding: 60px;
        }

        /* BUTTONS */
        .magnify-btn {
            position: absolute;
            top: 20px;
            right: 20px;
            background: rgba(0,123,255,0.1);
            border: 1px solid rgba(0,123,255,0.3);
            border-radius: 4px;
            padding: 5px 10px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 18px;
        }

        /* TYPOGRAPHY */
        .h-block { font-weight: bold; font-size: 20px; margin: 15px 0; text-align: center; line-height: 1.2; }
        .p-block { text-align: justify; margin-bottom: 12px; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.5; }
        .reflection-box { 
            background: var(--grey-bg); 
            border: 1px solid #000; 
            padding: 15px; 
            margin: 15px 0; 
            font-style: italic; 
        }

        /* TOC */
        .toc-row { display: flex; align-items: baseline; margin-bottom: 6px; font-size: 15px; }
        .toc-dots { flex-grow: 1; border-bottom: 1px dotted #000; margin: 0 5px; height: 12px; }
        .toc-page { font-weight: bold; }

        /* READER MODE TOGGLE */
        body[data-view="reader"] #ui-layer { display: none; }
        body[data-view="reader"] #reader-controls { display: block; }
        body[data-view="reader"] #document-stack { padding: 0; }

        .footer { position: absolute; bottom: 40px; left: 0; right: 0; text-align: center; font-size: 14px; }

        /* PHONE OPTIMIZATION */
        @media screen and (max-width: 800px) {
            #document-stack {
                transform: scale(0.45); /* Scales the whole book to fit narrow screens */
                transform-origin: top center;
                margin-bottom: -600px; /* Offset the scale gap */
            }
        }

operations.message: ✨ AI: The target block started with <script> but the surrounding context indicates the first function 'toggleView' is missing from the 'find_block'....
operations.explanation: The target block started with <script> but the surrounding context indicates the first function 'toggleView' is missing from the 'find_block'.
